category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for manipulating and plotting geographic and Cartesian data; official docs are Generic Mapping Tools documentation.
display_name_sources: Official website and documentation use GMT for The Generic Mapping Tools.
docs_sources: Official dedicated docs domain is titled The Generic Mapping Tools Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/GenericMappingTools/gmt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe geographic/cartesian data manipulation, plotting, projections, modules, and datasets.
